use_cases: Allow users to copy shareable links to clipboard with visual feedback
Open shared content in external applications via external link button
Display share options in a modal dialog triggered by a share button
Provide accessible tooltips for share action buttons
Support dark mode and light mode themes for cross-platform consistency
ai_summary: A share dialog component built with Radix UI primitives that provides users with options to copy shareable links to clipboard or open them in external applications. Features a clean, minimalist design with tooltip support, dark mode compatibility, and visual feedback on copy actions. Accessible and responsive for both desktop and mobile platforms.
